violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -No vent over the small flat top griddle. Staining the wall and ceiling.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Grease splatters around the fryers and cooking equipment.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Large vent hood has grease buildup.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust and grease and miscoloring of the walls and ceiling in the kitchen area.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Excessive ice buildup in both walk in freezers in the basement on food packages. South one has a large container catching condensation.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -No vent hood over the small flat top griddle. Staining on the walls and ceiling.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Areas around kitchen equipment need cleaned from grease splatters.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Large vent hood and ansul system need cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walls and ceiling are stained and need cleaned. Have dust buildup.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
